title: Arrays
description: Contiguous memory, O(1) random access, dynamic resizing, and common array operations.

title: Linked Lists
description: Node-pointer chains, O(1) insert/delete at head, traversal, and pointer manipulation.

title: Bubble Sort
description: Simple comparison sort that repeatedly swaps adjacent elements. O(n²) average.

title: Binary Search
description: Efficient O(log n) search on sorted arrays by repeatedly halving the search space.
